description: Power of attorney in Hebrew. Someone is appointed to sue Yeshuʿa. Some unusual formulae, and unusual hand. Late? T-S AS 206.304 and T-S AS 206.304 seem to be two different legal documents by the same scribe (both contain the phrase שלם ונפש חפצה, which reduces the likelihood that they come from the same document). There is additional text in Hebrew characters in the margins and on verso, in a different hand. T-S AS 206.306 is unidentified and looks similar to the second hand.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
